name: JSON2Video MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for JSON2Video API — a service that creates videos programmatically from JSON templates. Enables AI agents to generate professional videos with text overlays, images, audio, transitions, and animations by sending structured JSON to the JSON2Video rendering API.
use_cases: Generating marketing videos from structured data templates via AI content agents
Creating data visualization videos from JSON specifications for reporting agents
Automating video production for social media content pipelines
Building AI workflows that produce video summaries from structured content
not_for: Real-time video streaming or live video processing
Complex video editing requiring frame-level control
Free/high-volume video generation (JSON2Video is a paid API service)
best_when: A developer or content team wants to programmatically generate templated videos at scale — social media clips, data visualizations, marketing content — using AI agents to drive the JSON2Video API.
avoid_when: You need complex custom video editing, free video generation, or real-time video. JSON2Video is template-based programmatic generation.

auth.notes: JSON2Video API key required. Available from json2video.com developer portal after signup.

pricing.free_tier_limits: JSON2Video free tier: limited video minutes per month
pricing.paid_tiers: Paid plans for more video rendering minutes and resolution
pricing.notes: JSON2Video has a free trial tier. Production video generation requires paid plan. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: JSON2Video rate limits by plan tier; video rendering is inherently slow

known_agent_gotchas: Video rendering is asynchronous — agents must poll for completion, not expect immediate results
JSON template syntax is specific to JSON2Video — requires learning their schema
Video rendering can take 30-60+ seconds depending on length and complexity
Community MCP server — not official JSON2Video product
agent_readiness.security_notes: API key required. Video content may include proprietary data — stored on JSON2Video servers. HTTPS.

security_score_components.security_notes: API key. Video content uploaded to JSON2Video cloud. HTTPS. Consider content privacy for proprietary visuals.
